description.value: The creature is frightening. When a character first encounters the creature, they must make a Fear test with a difficulty determined by the creature's Fear rating (X). A Fear (1) creature requires a Challenging (+0) Willpower test, Fear (2) requires Difficult (–10), Fear (3) requires Hard (–20), and Fear (4) requires Very Hard (–30). X represents the Fear rating.

system.benefit: Characters encountering this creature must pass a Willpower test or suffer Fear effects. Fear (1) = Challenging (+0), Fear (2) = Difficult (–10), Fear (3) = Hard (–20), Fear (4) = Very Hard (–30). X is the Fear rating.
